description: Planning context emits the exact complexity_assessment keys downstream expects.
failure_mode: Model abbreviates required keys (e.g. emits `naming` instead of `naming_conventions`), breaking the standards-loading contract in feature-dev.
prompt: Produce the complexity_assessment block of a feature-planning context JSON for an L-size feature. Include the size_label, type_label, computed_score, and documentation_scope keys exactly as the schema requires.
